findings.description: The knowledge file shows `</component>` as the closing tag for the FilePathSetting component definition, but the source file has `</property>` as the closing tag. The source contains a mismatched closing tag (likely a typo), but the knowledge file silently modified it rather than faithfully reproducing the source.
findings.source_evidence: Source line: `</property>` (closing the `<component name="filePathSetting" ...>` opening tag)
